vllm.title: Fix cpu heavy code in async function _AsyncLLMEngine._run_workers_async
vllm.author: dominik-schwabe
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The function _AsyncLLMEngine._run_workers_async executes a function on the workers via getattr(worker, method) which is cpu bound and blocks the event loop and requests with fastapi for example can not be optimally served.
More specifically, the _queue in the created stream object in the following l
